config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as something society can override whenever it wants. In my view, the whole point of a just society is to protect people from being sacrificed for vague claims of the "greater good." From an Indonesian perspective, I value community deeply, but I also know how dangerous it is when authorities or majorities decide that individual freedoms are less important than collective interests.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diutamakan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu batas yang mencegah mayoritas atau pemerintah mengorbankan orang yang tidak punya suara. Tentu ada keadaan darurat tertentu di mana pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus sempit, transparan, dan bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan alasan umum. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah menekan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan sambil tetap menjaga tanggung jawab bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of gotong royong and social harmony, but I also know how easily “the public interest” can become an excuse for silencing dissent, protecting the powerful, or pressuring minorities to stay quiet. A healthy society is not one that can override people whenever it wants; it is one that protects individual rights while asking individuals to act responsibly toward others. Society matters, but its legitimacy depends on respecting the dignity and freedom of each person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus berada di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari perspektif Amerika, saya sangat curiga ketika “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan, karena sejarah menunjukkan betapa mudahnya mayoritas atau pemerintah melangkah terlalu jauh. Poin tentang gotong royong dan tanggung jawab bersama memang penting, tetapi itu tidak boleh menjadi alasan untuk mengorbankan hak dasar orang yang paling rentan atau tidak populer. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang benar-benar kuat justru yang mau membatasi dirinya sendiri demi melindungi kebebasan individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over individual rights as a general rule. In Indonesia, I value gotong royong and social harmony, but I have also seen how easily “public interest” can be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse abuses by authorities. The strongest society is not the one that can sacrifice the individual most easily; it is the one that protects basic rights while still asking people to contribute to the common good. Limited restrictions may be necessary in real emergencies, but they should never become a blank check for the majority.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena bagi saya hak individu harus menjadi batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar sembarangan oleh masyarakat atau pemerintah. Dari sudut pandang Amerika, saya melihat betapa sering alasan “kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk menekan minoritas, membungkam kritik, atau memberi justifikasi pada kekuasaan yang kebablasan. Memang ada situasi darurat yang menuntut pembatasan sementara, tetapi itu harus sangat sempit, diawasi ketat, dan tidak boleh berubah menjadi kebiasaan. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan orang, melainkan yang mampu menjaga kebebasan sambil tetap memikul tanggung jawab bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
